title: Managing and adding products
source: official iorad PDF 2401595 (Managing and adding products)

steps.caption: Welcome to the DISH POS dashboard. In this tutorial we show you how to manage and add products.
First, under Articles click on Products.
You are now in the overview of all your existing products.
To edit a product, click on the corresponding edit (pencil) icon.
A new window opens with the settings, which you can adjust. Once done, make sure to click Save.
If you want to create a copy of a product, use the corresponding duplicate icon.
The product is now copied. To change the name, click on the title of the product and type the desired name.
To remove a product, simply click on the delete (bin) icon.
To make sure you do not delete it by accident, you are asked to confirm your action by clicking Delete.
To add a new product, click on + Add product.
Fill in the name of the product using the text field.
Assign the product to a product group by selecting a group through the drop-down menu.
Afterwards, select the turnover group through the drop-down menu.
Then enter a price using the respective field.
Once you set up the product details, click Save. Remember to send the changes to your POS via General > General > Send.
